items.name: Filcher's Band
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Precision skill checks, covering Trickery, Presence, and Finesse. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Haulers
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Power skill checks, covering Might, Movement, and Bearing. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Foxfire
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Magic skill checks, covering Weaving, Spirit, and Creation. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Sinew Cord
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Vigor skill checks, covering Endurance, Renewal, and Resolve. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Journal
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Wit skill checks, covering Vigilance, Logic, and Lore. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Silk Runners
items.description: Grants a Lucky roll on Evasion skill checks, covering Reflex, Elusion, and Poise. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Ballast Cuff
items.description: A weighted cuff that settles the body and roots the stance. Grants a Lucky roll on Durability skill checks, covering Guard, Temper, and Anchor. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Aegis Charm
items.description: A warding charm that steadies mind and spirit against what would break them. Grants a Lucky roll on Resistance skill checks, covering Conviction, Sanctum, and Resonance. Roll two dice and keep the higher result.

items.name: Quiver
items.description: The Quiver enhances accuracy, ensuring success for up to three of your chosen attacks. These strikes land without an accuracy roll. You may still roll for a Fellmark to trigger bonus damage or effects, and any Fellstrike result is ignored.

items.name: Whetstone
items.description: The Whetstone empowers your strikes, doubling the damage of up to three chosen attacks. No action is required to activate it.

items.name: Astral Prism
items.description: The Astral Prism ensures the success of up to three chosen spells. No rolls are required. Each selected spell activates flawlessly.

items.name: Spell Magnifier
items.description: The Spell Magnifier doubles one effect of a chosen spell, such as its range, number of targets, damage, duration, bonus, or penalty. The enhancement applies once, when the spell is used.

items.name: Mantle
items.description: The Mantle provides evasion against up to three chosen physical attacks. It triggers the moment you are targeted, with no action required.

items.name: Cloak
items.description: The Cloak causes up to three chosen spell attacks against you to fail. It triggers the instant you are targeted, with no action required.

items.name: Shield
items.description: The Shield blocks all base and bonus damage from up to three attacks that target a chosen ally. It triggers the moment the ally is targeted, with no action required.

items.name: Amber Amulet
items.description: This charm doubles all Vitality healing you receive for the duration of a single battle. Its effect lasts until the fight ends.

items.name: Dragonscale Heart
items.description: This relic doubles your total Vitality for the duration of a single battle. Its power lasts until the fight ends.

items.name: Aether Lens
items.description: The Aether Lens reveals all discovered Skyvault Shards for the duration of a battle. Once per round you may spend your Act to draw a single shard into reach, even one that lies outside your normal range.

items.name: Revealing Powder
items.description: Lets the holder see through Obscured and Distortion effects until the end of the battle.

items.name: Talisman
items.description: Negates a single physical or magical attack, wasting the enemy's Act. You may declare it after the attack is declared. You forfeit your own Act on the following round from the strain.

items.name: Caltrops
items.description: Deals 1 damage to anything that steps on them or begins a round in their space. When thrown, they cover five adjacent spaces from where they land.

items.name: Smoke Bomb
items.description: After an attack hits you, you immediately reposition within your Mobility Range once the damage is resolved.

items.name: Water Skin
items.description: Negates the effects of Fatigue for the duration of a single battle. The water skin must remain equipped when the battle ends, through the Endurance check.

items.name: Swifting Sash
items.description: Grants one additional Act or React each round for the duration of the battle. Choose which when you declare. A decisive edge for the Fell who can spend it well.

items.name: Uncrossing Oil
items.description: Removes the negative effects of a single spell or ability, freeing the user from harmful conditions. It does not affect Afflictions, Discordants, or Impairments.

items.name: Ash Salt
items.description: Scattered over the afflicted, ash salt breaks a single Affliction and lifts it away. Use it freely outside combat, or spend your Act to use it during a fight.

items.name: Kindlestone
items.description: Holds up to three charges, banked into it outside of battle. Spend your Act to release them, raising your charge meter by the stored amount up to your cap.

items.name: Unbroken Cuirass
items.description: Forged from a Stalwart breastplate that took a killing blow and held. When an Impairment would take hold of you, the plate breaks in its place. Prevent one Impairment before it lands, or shake off one already on you.

items.name: Skeleton Key
items.description: Upon death, you are revived from Pandemonium with 1 Vitality. It triggers on its own, pulling the soul back from the brink with no action or roll.

items.name: Tablet
items.cost: 3 Atla, double for Tier 2 and triple for Tier 3
items.description: Carries a weapon attack engraved on its surface. Used against a target within range of the engraved physical ability, it strikes automatically with no accuracy roll. The effect triggers the moment the target is chosen.

items.name: Potion
items.cost: 3 Atla, double for Tier 2 and triple for Tier 3
items.description: Carries a spell sealed in its liquid. Thrown at a target within the spell's range, it casts automatically with no accuracy or casting roll. The effect triggers the moment the liquid lands.

items.name: Rune
items.cost: 2 Atla, double for Tier 2 and triple for Tier 3
items.description: Holds a spell bound within its sigils. When a target steps into the marked space, the rune casts the spell automatically with no roll. The effect triggers the instant the rune is sprung.

items.name: Trap
items.cost: 2 Atla, double for Tier 2 and triple for Tier 3
items.description: Holds a physical ability wound into its gears. When a target steps into the marked space, the trap strikes automatically with no accuracy roll. The effect triggers the instant the trap is sprung.

items.name: Glyph
items.description: An Affliction captured on a scroll. Apply it to a weapon outside of battle to carry the Affliction into your strikes, or spend your Act in a fight to lay the Affliction directly onto an enemy.

items.name: Grappling Hook
items.description: Once per battle, hook a target you can see along a clear path within twice your Mobility Range, an enemy, an ally, or an open space. Either pull the target into an open space beside you, or pull yourself into an open space beside it.

items.name: Scabbard
items.description: The first attack you draw each battle lands as a Fellmark, dealing its bonus damage and triggering its effects with no roll.

items.name: Stifling Soles
items.description: When your party moves to ambush, your approach succeeds without a roll. The opening is yours before the first die is cast.

items.name: Fleetsoles
items.description: Once per battle, take an extra move of up to your Mobility Range without spending your Act. You cross hazards in the path as if they were not there.

items.name: Bracewell
items.description: Spend your React to brace the buckler, halving the damage of one attack against you, of any kind.

items.name: Rootgreaves
items.description: For one battle you cannot be Pushed or Pulled. Your footing holds against any force that would move you.

items.name: Gloomcowl
items.description: Draw the cowl and vanish into gloom, becoming Obscured to enemies until you attack or the round ends.

items.name: Spellsewn Robes
items.description: Once this battle, a spell you cast lingers one extra round.

items.name: Skyvault Shard
items.description: A Skyvault Shard kept ready rather than searched for in the heat of battle. It is a shard in full and does everything one does. Spend it to heal, to imprint or slag an ability, to fuel a Paragon, or to charge all three tiers when you hold no weapon, each at the cost of your Act. At rest it restores you to full Vitality and rolls to shed Fatigue, and it can revive a fallen Fell from Pandemonium at full Vitality, one of the few things that can. A Skyvault Shard is never bought or sold, only found.

items.name: Darkshard
items.description: A shard of Pandemonium, the reverse of a Skyvault Shard, that feeds on them. Set it in an open space, opening a 10 space radius. Feed it Skyvault Shards, each one raising its Vitality by 1, and while you stand within the radius you may keep feeding it. Every enemy inside the radius is cut off from the Aether, left with nothing but standard attacks. Weapon abilities, spells, infusions, augmentations, armor stances, and lorebound Aspects all fall silent. It shatters when it takes damage equal to its Vitality, which ends the effect. A darkshard is never bought or sold, only carried up out of Pandemonium.

items.name: Augur
items.description: A guiding spark, called forth to track an item, quest, or person. It manifests as a glowing mote of light that leads its owner toward the chosen target, revealing hidden objects and enemies and piercing the darkness and illusions that would block sight. Its glow lasts until its purpose is fulfilled or a battle begins.

items.name: Food Portion
items.description: Each food portion eaten grants a Renewal roll for healing. During a rest you may consume a number of portions equal to 1 plus your Vigor.

items.name: Upgrade Kit
items.description: Allows a weapon to reforge into its next form, unlocking new ability and affliction options and altering its range and grip.

items.name: Resonant Tuner
items.description: Unlocks a locked slot for an Infusion, Affliction, Augmentation, or Aspect. Once a weapon already has three slots filled, the tuner may add one more slot beyond its normal limit.

items.name: Treasure Key
items.description: Used at the loot roll, it increases your result by 1, shifting it upward by one number.

items.name: Lore Manual
items.description: Increases competency in a single skill by 1 point. One of the few things in the Sphere that can raise a skill outside the slow work of use, and rare enough that most Fell never hold one.

items.name: Camp Kettle
items.description: Shared over a rest, the kettle clears every rank of Fatigue from the whole party at once.

items.name: Overture
items.description: Played for a chosen party at rest. At the start of their next battle, each Fell it was played for negates the first hostile Combat Effect that would take hold of them.

items.name: Lodestone
items.description: Held by a Fell at rest, the needle swings off its old heading and a life turns with it. The Fell resets to level 0. All spent Ascension Crystals return, and every skill Mastery is refunded as 6 skill points to spend anew. Nothing of the old build survives but the choice to set a new course.

items.name: Reading Wheel
items.description: Spend it at rest on a relic whose purpose you do not know. The wheel turns until it reads true, then tells you plainly what the relic does. It reads one relic, then falls still.

items.name: Wispin Coin
items.description: One of the rarest things a Fell can hold. Spent outside of combat, the coin opens a door into Whip's Emporium for a single visit. Only the Fell who flips it may step through. Inside you may buy, sell, and trade whatever Whip is carrying at Whip's prices, and the coin is spent when the door closes behind you. Whip deals with no one bound to an enemy he is running from, and anyone who threatens him in his own shop finds the coin will never answer them again. The LoreMaster decides what he carries and what he asks for it.

items.name: Butcher Knife
items.description: Taken to a defeated enemy in place of your loot roll. The knife carves out one of the weapon abilities that enemy carried and leaves it as a Tablet or a Trap, your choice. It can take only what the enemy actually had, at the tier the LoreMaster allows.

items.name: Marrow Tap
items.description: Worked into a defeated enemy in place of your loot roll. It draws out one of the spells that enemy could cast and seals it as a Potion or a Rune, your choice. It can take only what the enemy actually had, at the tier the LoreMaster allows.

items.name: Flensing Hook
items.description: Drawn across a defeated enemy in place of your loot roll. It strips one of the Afflictions that enemy could inflict and pins it to a Glyph. It can take only what the enemy actually had, at the tier the LoreMaster allows.
